title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: 美國佛羅里達州起訴OpenAI，指控其容許ChatGPT協助和教唆大規模槍擊案
summary: 佛羅里達州總檢察長烏斯邁爾指控OpenAI及其首席執行官山姆·阿爾特曼構建了一張「欺騙之網」。

title: Bitmine buys $52M ETH as Tom Lee says price not yet showing Ethereum’s strength
summary: Bitmine is aiming to hold 5% of the total circulating supply of 120.6 million Ether tokens and is about 90% of the way to its target after its latest purchase.

title: Defense tech darling Mach Industries hits $1.8B valuation, a 4x jump in a year
summary: In a wild ride for 22-year-old founder and CEO Ethan Thornton, Mach Industries has raised another $300 million. It already has five autonomous vehicles in development and completed a major acquisition.

title: TON Price Pumps After Telegram CEO Says Token Will Be Rebranded to Gram
summary: Telegram is taking the reins of The Open Network, years after abandoning the project—and it plans to adopt Toncoin's originally planned name.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Warns $1.75 Billion IPO Investors of Potential Future Share Dilution
summary: SpaceX's amended IPO filing signals the company may issue substantial new shares in future transactions as Elon Musk expands its ambitions.

title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
summary: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

title: Florida Sues OpenAI, Sam Altman Over ChatGPT Safety Claims
summary: Florida's attorney general seeks damages, restrictions on ChatGPT, and personal liability for OpenAI CEO Sam Altman in what the state describes as the first state-led lawsuit against the AI company.

title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
summary: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

title: Anthropic files to go public
summary: Anthropic, now an AI powerhouse that has landed top-tier enterprise customers, was once considered an underdog in the emerging world of large language models.

title: SpaceX says it may issue ‘significant’ equity in ‘future transactions’
summary: The company added a warning to prospective investors that a major dilution could be in the cards after it goes public.

title: AI Giant Anthropic Files to Go Public After Nearing $1 Trillion Valuation
summary: Claude maker Anthropic said Monday that it confidentially filed to launch an IPO in the U.S. following another huge funding round.

title: Whitehat Helps Recover $2M in ETH Stuck Since 2016 ICO
summary: A whitehat developer helped return funds from HongCoin's failed 2016 token sale after a bug left investor refunds frozen for nine years.

title: Binance Opens Access to 7,000 US Stocks, Prepares Tokenized 'bStocks' Rollout
summary: Binance opened equities trading and previewed "bStocks," with experts split over whether tokenization unlocks growth or layers on new risk.

title: Strava declares war on scrapers ahead of IPO

summary:
